skos:definition.@value: to shine, be bright or luminous, etc. etc
to shine forth, appear, show one's self
to be splendid or beautiful or eminent
to appear as, seem, look like, pass for
eine glänzende Erscheinung bilden, in seinem Glanze erscheinen, prangen, eine hervorragende Stellung einnehmen; eine traurige Erscheinung sein
erscheinen, sich zeigen, zum Vorschein kommen

@graph.rdf:value:
<L>149418<pc>750,3<k1>BA<k2>BA<h>1<e>1
<hom>1.</hom> <s>BA</s> ¦ <ab>cl.</ab> 2. <ab>P.</ab> (<ls>Dhātup. xxiv, 43</ls>) <s>BA/ti</s> (<ab>pr. p.</ab> <s>BAt</s> <lex type="part">f.</lex> <s>BAntI</s> or <s>BAtI</s>, <ls>Vop.</ls>; <ab>Pot.</ab> <s>BAyAt</s>, <ls>TBr.</ls>; <ab>pl.</ab> <s>baBO</s>, <ls>Mn.</ls>; <ls>MBh.</ls> &c.; <ab>aor.</ab> <s>aBAsIt</s> <ab>Gr.</ab> <ls>Bhaṭṭ.</ls>; <ab>fut.</ab> <s>BAsya/ti</s>, <ls>Br.</ls> &c.),
<div n="to"/>to shine, be bright or luminous, <ls>RV.</ls> &c. &c.;
<div n="to"/>to shine forth, appear, show one's self, <ls>ib.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to be splendid or beautiful or eminent, <ls>MBh.</ls>; <ls>Kāv.</ls> &c. (with <s>na</s>, to cut a poor figure, <ls>Kathās.</ls>);
<div n="to"/>to appear as, seem, look like, pass for (<ab>nom.</ab> with or without <s>iva</s> <ab>adv.</ab> in <s>vat</s>), <ls>MBh.</ls>; <ls>Kāv.</ls> &c.;
<div n="to"/>to be, exist, <ls>W.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to show, exhibit, manifest, <ls>Bhaṭṭ.</ls> (<ab>v.l.</ab>) :
<div n="vp"/><ab>Pass.</ab> <s>BAyate</s>, <ab>impers.</ab> radiance is put forth by (<ab>instr.</ab>), <ls>Bhaṭṭ.</ls> :
<div n="vp"/><ab>Caus.</ab> <s>BApayate</s>;
<div n="vp"/> <ab>aor.</ab> <s>abIBapat</s> <ab>Gr.</ab>:
<div n="vp"/><ab>Desid.</ab> <s>biBAsati</s>, <ls>ib.</ls> :
<div n="vp"/><ab>Intens.</ab> <s>bABAyate</s>, <s>bABeti</s>, <s>bABAti</s>, <ls>ib.</ls> <info westergaard="BA,24.43,02.0054"/><info whitneyroots="BA,110"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="2P"/>
<LEND>
